The only real mistake is the one from which we learn nothing.
The fear of death follows from the fear of life. A man who lives fully is prepared to die at any time.
A single act of kindness throws out roots in all directions, and the roots spring up and make new trees.
Avoiding danger is no safer in the long run than exposure.
A real friend is one who walks in when the rest of the world walks out.
Life is from the inside out. When you shift on the inside, life shifts on the outside.
The soul should always stand ajar, ready to welcome the ecstatic experience.
Enjoy when you can, and endure when you must.
If life were predictable it would cease to be life, and be without flavor.
You drown not by falling into a river, but by staying submerged in it.
All leaders are readers.
If you chase two rabbits, you catch none.
Everyone has a sense of humor. If you don't laugh at jokes, you probably laugh at opinions.
Greatness lies not in being strong, but in the right use of strength.
Mistakes are painful when they happen, but years later a collection of mistakes is what is called experience.
Misfortune shows those who are not really friends.
All wealth is the product of labor.
Success is getting what you want. Happiness is wanting what you get.
It's better to have a short life that is full of what you like doing, than a long life spent in a miserable way.
Goals are the fuel in the furnace of achievement.
Family not only needs to consist of merely those whom we share blood, but also of those whom we'd give blood.
Imagination is the true magic carpet.
If a thing is worth doing, it is worth doing badly.
He is richest who is content with the least, for content is the wealth of nature.
To find yourself, think for yourself.
A different result requires doing something different.
The more knowledge you have, the more you're free to rely on your instincts.
We suffer for the simple reason that suffering is biologically useful. It is nature's preferred agent for inspiring change.
An intelligent person hires people who are more intelligent than he is.
Love is not about possession. Love is about appreciation.
You get paid in direct proportion to the difficulty of problems you solve.
Progress comes to those who train and train; reliance on secret techniques will get you nowhere.
You just can't beat the person who never gives up.
You cannot change your destination overnight but you can change your direction overnight.
Appear weak when you are strong, and strong when you are weak.

If the grass is greener on the other side, maybe that's because you're not taking good care of your grass.

Do every act of your life as if it were your last.
Nothing important is learned; it is simply remembered.

Outstanding people have one thing in common: an absolute sense of mission.
There is no sadder sight than a young pessimist.
Be polite to all, but intimate with few.
Live your life and forget your age.
Nothing has any power over me other than that which I give it through my conscious thoughts.
We are most nearly ourselves when we achieve the seriousness of the child at play.
Enjoy every minute of life. Never second-guess life.
Happiness is a gift and the trick is not to expect it, but to delight in it when it comes.
